completed_tasks.name: Phase 05-01: Backend export router (4 StreamingResponse endpoints)
Phase 05-02: Frontend export wiring on BugReportPage + SprintPage

blockers.description: npm install EACCES on WSL NTFS mount (pre-existing, non-blocking)
blockers.workaround: Use Docker (docker-compose up --build). Backend must be rebuilt after requirements.txt changes.

blockers.description: Docker WSL integration disabled — docker CLI not available in WSL shell
blockers.workaround: Run docker commands via: powershell.exe -Command "cd 'C:\Users\ps\Desktop\workshop_AI\group2_warnnoi300percent'; docker-compose ..."

blockers.description: Many .planning/ files show as modified in git status — NTFS CRLF/LF artifact, not real changes
blockers.workaround: Ignore. Run git diff to confirm only line-ending diffs.

human_actions_pending.context: Frontend wiring is complete but download flow needs manual verification in browser at http://localhost:3000

decisions.decision: Excel export = single sheet, columns: ID|Summary|Status|Priority|Assignee|Fix Version
decisions.rationale: Raw data so user can filter/sort in Excel

decisions.decision: Word BugReport = title+metadata+stats+donut chart (matplotlib, wedgeprops width=0.5)+bug table
Word Sprint = title+metadata+fix version info+stats+bug table, NO chart
No get_current_user auth dep on export endpoints — ambient OAuth
decisions.rationale: Matches all other routers in codebase
Non-interactive backend; no display available in container

next_action: Project is 100% complete (5/5 phases). Next step: run /gsd-audit-milestone or manual UAT testing of export downloads.
context_notes: All 5 phases delivered: (1) Jira OAuth connection, (2) data sync, (3) dashboard UI, (4) sprint report, (5) export. Backend was rebuilt today to fix missing matplotlib module. Export handlers wired on BugReportPage and SprintPage — fetch blob, trigger download, show Exporting... state, surface errors via existing banner.
